About Me

I'm a 25-year-old Computer Engineering student at the University of Bohol, entering my 3rd year. I'm passionate about technology and solving real-world problems through engineering. My interests lie in hardware design, programming, and system-level thinking.


I served as Project Manager and QA Engineer for the Comprehensive Banking System project in my 2nd year — a C-based banking application built by our Group 3 team. I enjoy collaborative work and am always looking to grow my technical and leadership skills.

Interests & Hobbies

  • Building and tinkering with small electronics and circuits
  • Writing C programs to solve logic problems
  • Learning about new technologies and engineering trends
  • Exploring web development and digital tools

// 001 — About

Who I Am

Hi! I'm Duane Joseph R. Banate, a 25-year-old Computer Engineering student at the University of Bohol, currently entering my 3rd year. I'm passionate about technology, problem-solving, and building solutions that matter.

My academic journey has given me a solid foundation in hardware design, digital electronics, and programming in C. I served as Project Manager & QA Engineer for our group's Comprehensive Banking System — a full C-based ATM simulation.

Based in the beautiful island province of Bohol, Philippines, I aspire to contribute to the tech industry through purposeful engineering and continuous learning.

// 003 — Projects

Academic Projects

Projects completed during 1st & 2nd Year of BS Computer Engineering

1st Year · 2023–2024 · 1st Semester
Comprehensive Banking System
A C-based ATM simulation system with user account management, deposits, withdrawals, transaction history, admin controls, and bill management. Served as Project Manager & QA Engineer.
C Language File Handling CLI Admin Controls Group 3
1st Year · 2023–2024
Number Systems Converter
A program that converts between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal — a practical application of computer arithmetic fundamentals.
CNumber SystemsAcademic
1st Year · 2023–2024
Digital Logic Circuit Design
Designed and simulated combinational and sequential logic circuits using logic gates as part of Digital Electronics coursework.
Digital LogicCircuit DesignSimulation
2nd Year · 2024–2025
Student Record Management System
A database-driven system for managing student records including enrollment, grades, and personal data using MySQL.
MySQLHTML/CSSPHPCRUD
2nd Year · 2024–2025
